scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && tsc -p tsconfig.json && npx esbuild dist/index.js --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.bundle.js --external:node:* && node -e "require('node:fs').renameSync('dist/index.bundle.js','dist/index.js')"
scripts.test: npm run build:deps && npm run build && node --test test/*.test.mjs
